title: leonurus cardiaca var. canescens
intro: Leonurus cardiaca var. canescens, also known as Wood Betony, is a variety of the Heartwort plant, a flowering perennial native to Europe and Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and sedative effects, making it useful for reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and improving cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Leonurus cardiaca var. canescens include reducing inflammation, improving sleep quality, and lowering blood pressure. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
